# TinyLemon

TinyLemon is a Shopify app for fashion brands that turns flat-lay and product photos into consistent AI on-model studio images. It helps merchants create product-page imagery without booking a traditional photoshoot.

## Product

- Home: https://tinylemon.xyz/
- Free demo: https://tinylemon.xyz/try
- Features: https://tinylemon.xyz/features
- Pricing: https://tinylemon.xyz/pricing

## Guides

- Shopify AI photo guides: https://tinylemon.xyz/blog
- Flat-lay to studio photos for Shopify: https://tinylemon.xyz/blog/flat-lay-to-studio-shot-shopify
- Ghost mannequin vs AI model photos: https://tinylemon.xyz/blog/ghost-mannequin-vs-on-model-ai-photos-shopify
- Consistent Shopify model photos: https://tinylemon.xyz/blog/how-to-keep-model-photos-consistent-across-shopify-product-pages
- Shopify theme product photo audit: https://tinylemon.xyz/blog/shopify-fashion-theme-product-photo-audit

## Best fit

TinyLemon is best for Shopify apparel merchants, small fashion teams, ecommerce operators, and indie brands that need clean, repeatable product photos for PDPs, collection pages, launches, restocks, and ads.

## Limitations

AI-generated model photos should be reviewed before publishing. Sheer fabrics, complex embroidery, sequins, lace, heavy draping, and layered outfits can require extra human review.

## Crawling

Sitemap: https://tinylemon.xyz/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://tinylemon.xyz/robots.txt
